sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75661" key="o)/sfra" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὄσφρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n75661.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀσμή</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg030:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0532.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.38</biblScope> </bibl>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀσφραίνομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
